Photography Career Contest - Theme #2

A new opportunity to etch your name in Star Atlas history is here!  
The next theme for the Photography Career Contest is "Environment".  

Publish your photos now - the winning shot will be minted and can be sold by you on our Galactic Marketplace!

Learn more about the Photography Career Contest and how to participate
